# Archetype: CodebaseIndex

*Auto-generated from `tools/archetypes/assignments.mjs` and `catalog/catalog.json`.*

**Seed archetype** (PRD §5.2).

**Workload.** Per-token code retrieval; symbol-aware indexing.

**Why this archetype.** High-value SDK use case. Upstream support is currently THIN — ColBERT primitives in core, ruvector-decompiler is JS-only. Flagged as v0.2 risk: archetype may need to ship as recipes-on-top-of-KnowledgeBase rather than a first-class archetype.

> ⚠ Risk: `thin-upstream-support`

Headline: ✅ exposed at SDK top-level.
